Comfortable Accommodation: Apartment by the sea two rooms in Aktau offers a one-bedroom apartment with a living room. The property features a balcony with sea views, air-conditioning, and a washing machine.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, a fully equipped kitchen with a refrigerator, oven, and kitchenware. The apartment includes a dining table, sofa bed, TV, and wardrobe.
Convenient Location: Located 26 km from Aktau International Airport, the apartment is a 7-minute walk from Aktau Beach. Nearby attractions include Aktau Beach and Aktau International Airport.
Guest Satisfaction: Highly rated by guests for its convenient location and room comfort. Private check-in and check-out services ensure a smooth arrival and departure.

hotels.description_en:
Beachfront and Garden: Ustyurt boutique hotel in Aktau offers direct beachfront access and a lush garden. Guests can relax by the sea or enjoy the serene outdoor spaces.
Dining Experience: The hotel features a traditional and modern restaurant serving Asian cuisine with halal options. A buffet breakfast is available, complemented by free WiFi throughout the property.
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms include air-conditioning, private bathrooms, sea views, balconies, and modern amenities. Family rooms and free on-site private parking cater to all guest needs.
Convenient Location: Located 27 km from Aktau International Airport, the hotel is a 14-minute walk from Marrakesh Beach. Nearby attractions include Aktau city centre and Aktau International Airport.
